Watch: www.youtube.com/watch?v=1xyf...

items.title: Hollinger POTD Tierre Brown. Speedy McNeese St PG was undrafted in 01 but made HOU as a backup. Had stints w/CLE & NO but longest run was 76 gms w/LAL in 04-05 (4.4 ppg, 2 apg in 14 mpg). From 05-15, played in minors & abroad.  Was NBDL MVP in 04.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollinger POTD Tierre Brown. Speedy McNeese St PG was undrafted in 01 but made HOU as a backup. Had stints w/CLE & NO but longest run was 76 gms w/LAL in 04-05 (4.4 ppg, 2 apg in 14 mpg). From 05-15, played in minors & abroad.  Was NBDL MVP in 04.

items.title: Hollinger POTD Earl Boykins. Tiny Eastern Michigan PG was undrafted but bounced around NBA starting in 99 w/NJ, ORL, CLE & LAC. Finally broke thru as scoring bench PG for GS in 02. Signed w/DEN & he had best yrs (13 ppg). Declined after 07 but hung around til 2012. Fun player.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollinger POTD Earl Boykins. Tiny Eastern Michigan PG was undrafted but bounced around NBA starting in 99 w/NJ, ORL, CLE & LAC. Finally broke thru as scoring bench PG for GS in 02. Signed w/DEN & he had best yrs (13 ppg). Declined after 07 but hung around til 2012. Fun player.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Tony Bennett. Played for father at Wisconsin-Green Bay as heady PG. Drafted 35th by CHA in 92. Earned backup job behind Muggsy before injuries ended NBA career in 95. Good shooter but slow for a PG. Also, played in New Zealand. Coached Virginia quite well.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Tony Bennett. Played for father at Wisconsin-Green Bay as heady PG. Drafted 35th by CHA in 92. Earned backup job behind Muggsy before injuries ended NBA career in 95. Good shooter but slow for a PG. Also, played in New Zealand. Coached Virginia quite well.

items.title: Hollander POTD Corey Gaines. Loyola Marymount star PG was drafted 65th by SEA in 88. Spent a decade bouncing between NBA & CBA. Best run was w/DEN & Westhead in 90-91 (8.3 ppg). Played in NBA thru 95 & minors/abroad thru 03. Was an NBA asst coach for years. Now coaches in Japan.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Corey Gaines. Loyola Marymount star PG was drafted 65th by SEA in 88. Spent a decade bouncing between NBA & CBA. Best run was w/DEN & Westhead in 90-91 (8.3 ppg). Played in NBA thru 95 & minors/abroad thru 03. Was an NBA asst coach for years. Now coaches in Japan.

items.title: Benson POTD Billy Donovan. Providence PG broke out as senior (20 ppg 7 apg) & drafted 68th by UTA in 87. Cut in camp & hooked up w/NY as a backup (2.4 ppg in 44 gms). Tried to make UTA again in 88-89 but waived. Went into coaching in 89 & has been ever since.

items.title: New: Reviewing Paul George’s second season with the Sixers, a wildly mixed bag.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
New: Reviewing Paul George’s second season with the Sixers, a wildly mixed bag.

After returning from suspension, George finally proved capable of submitting star-level scoring nights. But the playoffs exposed the major flaw which remains in his shot diet:
www.phillyvoice.com/sixers-news-...
